{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603222010264B5CE3A9F791307F29E8"}"},"total":17},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7599325058068513560","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我就说怎么从开始就看着怪怪的，不是悟空原本的性格，就悟空那傻样，咋会说出那情话？我想做你老公，一生一世的那种，这种话悟空绝对说不出来"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769358949,"group_id":"7592088349297347608","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"881143376263920"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7592088349297347608","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"11"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读51分钟后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3080,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7599318150327173912","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"设定挺严谨的，就身体有极限，气没有极限那里，好多同人都在这里犯错，说什么收住气，纯靠肉身到深海锻炼，评论区那些和说和布尔玛组CP的，哥们，这个悟空是超四重生归来，真按悟空的性格不会和布尔玛在一起，还是琪琪，悟空很爱琪琪的，不然漫画里也不会老是时不时提一嘴琪琪"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769357351,"group_id":"7592088349297347608","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx+YRXTBRvtXdzXHvbxu8Dw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"881143376263920","user_name":"无形无色的五巨头"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"881143376263920","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7592088349297347608","book_info":{"abstract":"【单女主】+【女主布尔玛】不能接受的别看。
GT孙悟空在神龙的背上睡着了，竟然回到了梦开始的地方。
重活一世，再次面对曾经的青梅竹马——布尔玛，孙悟空表示这一次我知道该选谁了。
【叮！绑定神级装逼系统。】
【温馨提示:本系统专为装逼而生。】
【只要言行震惊他人，无论是超越期待、还是颠覆认知、亦或是优雅打脸，都可以获取装逼值。】
【装逼值可以抽奖，也可以兑换物资。】
【总之装逼就可以变强】
孙悟空挠了挠头，不是……我孙悟空还需要什么系统？
直到扭头一看，布尔玛双眼都是小星星，孙悟空表示没人比我更懂得装逼。
天下第一杀手，我不允许你的御柱飞行比我更帅。
贝吉特，你这逼王没你出场的份了，逼王的头衔换我了。
哟！区区破坏神比鲁斯，敢装到你逼王的头上了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o54e6a3a7ab147b0861a93c65d88a6d59~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"爱吃炒豌豆苗的柏博","author_id":"","book_id":"7592088349297347608","book_name":"龙珠：我孙悟空真没想装逼啊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383850","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2507人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":376,"name":"龙珠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=376&name=龙珠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7592092337002529342","read_count":"2507","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"204046"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"94","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,轻小说,重生,龙珠,系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o54e6a3a7ab147b0861a93c65d88a6d59~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365426&x-signature=yUvYN5alu7SfRh3b%2BapF%2ByDkSPg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"92551878650","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603222010264B5CE3A9F791307F29E8"}"},"
